mapper.select: SELECT rv.id, rv.book_id, rv.reader_id, rv.rating, rv.content, rv.create_time, b.name AS book_name, r.name AS reader_name FROM review rv LEFT JOIN book b ON rv.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON rv.reader_id = r.id WHERE rv.book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY rv.create_time DESC

SELECT rv.id, rv.book_id, rv.reader_id, rv.rating, rv.content, rv.create_time, b.name AS book_name, r.name AS reader_name FROM review rv LEFT JOIN book b ON rv.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON rv.reader_id = r.id WHERE rv.reader_id = #{readerId} ORDER BY rv.create_time DESC

SELECT rv.id, rv.book_id, rv.reader_id, rv.rating, rv.content, rv.create_time, b.name AS book_name, r.name AS reader_name FROM review rv LEFT JOIN book b ON rv.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON rv.reader_id = r.id WHERE rv.id = #{id}

SELECT rv.id, rv.book_id, rv.reader_id, rv.rating, rv.content, rv.create_time, b.name AS book_name, r.name AS reader_name FROM review rv LEFT JOIN book b ON rv.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON rv.reader_id = r.id WHERE rv.book_id = #{bookId} AND rv.reader_id = #{readerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (book_id, reader_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{readerId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(rating) FROM review WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) AS count FROM review WHERE book_id = #{bookId} GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC
